item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I want a fight scene involving these two. Kick in the cheek vs punch in the crotch.
Brilliant article, though it'd be unpleasant to have your legs walk out on you. I'll see myself out.
+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Yeah I'm head over heels about this scip too

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
A perfect blend of humour, horror and mystery in a scip. Oh and I'm pretty sure the reason the Foundation hasn't given -2 the ability to communicate is because he'd be talking out his arse…… I'll get me coat. +1
Edit: one thing slightly bothers me though. Shouldn't this be Euclid given both halves are sentient and not a member of the Foundation as they are brand new personalities?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
For the duration of this interview, SCP-1319-2 was provided with one standard pair of tap shoes.
-2's responses are translated from Morse code.

Dr: Do they fit comfortably?
-2: yes
Dr: You know that we've already spoken to 1319-1?
-2: that [multiple expletives removed for brevity]
Dr: Yes, well, that's why we would like to hear your side of the story. Why did the two of you separate?
-2: that control freak was always on my ass about every little thing. all I do is follow orders he is the one with plans. then when something goes wrong it is my fault all of the sudden. i don't think so. (Translator's note: last sentence made by stamping full foot with great force.)
Dr: Can you give me any examples?
-2: that day in the caf. he starts shoveling down this grease bomb triple fire burrito garbage. and i try to tell him. stomach can not handle that. but he does not care. always the same. he likes the taste so i have to deal with indigestion and heartburn and do not get me started on the bathroom situation. he just reads his phone and leaves me to the crap jobs every time. we are supposed to be in this together but can i get some bran flakes down here? as if.
so i try to get his attention with a tiny bit of acid reflux and he just flips out…

Researcher's note: At this point -2 developed a lower leg cramp preventing further communication and the interview was discontinued.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Now I want to hear SCP-1319-2 side of the story. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I really like this, but couldn't the Foundation make a giant keyboard or Ouija Board to comunicate with -2?
+1 anyway.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I love this. Simple and perfect.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This is very funny, but also kind of sad to me. The fact that a researcher split himself in half and that his lower and upper torso began to argue with one another is pretty amusing, but the fact that the lower torso is unwilling to come back to the upper body out of irrational resentment is kinda depressing. This entire SCP encompasses a broken friendship, and the idea of a broken friendship always makes feel a little down in the dumps.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: There are a good bit of half baked limb related SCPs, this is not one of them.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I wonder if SCP-1319-1 misses sex.

item.title: Woooowww
item.content:encoded: I just read this today aaannnd… i loved it.. now im not sure if this is adding anything to the convo but… if, they eventually settle their differences and decide to (pun intended) get together again does the agent blackbox comeback and if yes… while they fuse, does it have like background voltron/voltes v music?? And will he have memories of the split?? Aagggghh so many questions.. I LOVE IT

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I don't know if 'delightful' is how I should be describing this. It might make me sound like a maniac.

Nevertheless, this was delightful

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
We have a lot of autonomous, apparently sapient body parts on this site. Thinking of the recent disembodied hand that didn't like the serial killer body he was attached to, as well as that strange malady that caused limbs to "break up with" their owners only to teleport to a mysterious warehouse somewhere. So… this has been done before. Many times, on this site specifically.

That said… I still upvoted this. It's kind of the perfect blend of absurd,, creepy and humorous that I think best represents the voice of the site. Or at least best represents the kind of writing I'd personally like to see on this site.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Now that's what I call a split personality.

Please don't hurt me.

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
My lungs spontaneously dematerialized.
+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: He divorced his lower half. I am crying, this is a fabulous example of just the perfect amounts of what the actual fuck. +1.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
2 questions:

Who is really responsible for the split? -1,-2, or did both do stuff that they need to apologize for?

If neither half has the personality of the whole, where did the whole's personality go? did they split that as well, or did they just pull new personalities out of the air? would getting them to forgive each other and join back together bring back the original personality?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This is so simple yet so damn weird and funny, I love it. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Awesome idea. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This is awesome. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I lol'd a hearty lol.

+1

What is it with the 1300s block and phenomenal SCPs?

Looks like almost everyone upvoted, too.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Besides the obvious reasons, of this opening up a whole new world of possibilities with body parts being sentient, and what-not, I like this because it's a foundation anomaly, and those are always entertaining in some way.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I'm trying to think of a terrible head-related pun to include with my comment. But, I can't, so upvote.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
It was… so bizarre… I just have to love it!

+1 all the way!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: +1 to THAT.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I normally only enjoy the most terrifying SCP's, but this was extremely creative and very funny. Loved the interview with 1319-2. upvoted for sure.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Really, u0ve earned all my mindfucks for the rest of the year dude. This is brilliant, I can't quite express how impressive I think it it. +1 and +Mindfuck.

P.S: At least me and my half down have a good relationship.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Added something to that effect.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I share Lumancer's gripe, with the additional gripe of 'it seems mildly contrived for this to happen to a Foundation worker and no one speculates that gee, maybe it had something to do with some other anomalous cause' (even a note saying that no apparent cause was found despite investigation would work)

That aside, I really like this.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: My only gripe is that the Foundation hasn't thought to rig an oversized keyboard or other communication method for the lower half- there are lots of solutions, at least a few of which are obvious. Otherwise, +1.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Just…holy crap. This is weird as hell, in an awesome way. I'd love to hear what happens if the two parts were stuck together in the same room; or if they taught -2 to write with his toes. Poor half-guy, just can't express himself to well. Total +1. And an extra virtual +1 for the lower half of the guy.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This is fantastic. Best creation of an SCP ever.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Ahh, I love an article that tells a story. This has such a lot of personality, and the logs were nice and snappy. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: The idea of a man eating lunch, then suddenly violently bursting into two halves before returning to finish his meal is amazing. I don't usually enjoy SCPs that work in humor, but this one just works so well.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: What if — and hear me out on this one — what if you didn't

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I would like to reiterate the above comment in its entirety.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Suddenly, he was observed to say the words 'You know what? Fuck this. Fuck you.', seconds before violently separating into SCP-1319-1 and SCP-1319-2. SCP-1319-2 attempted to flee the area, while SCP-1319-1 attempted to climb up the table and resume consumption of Research Assistant █████'s lunch.

I'd hate to be eating lunch with my friend when suddenly his legs run away and his face shoves itself into his sandwich.

This is delightfully weird, and manages to be slightly creepy without trying hard or sounding stupid. Upvoted.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I really like this, but I have a couple of questions. Are they actually bloody at the site of separation or have the areas healed over? I would guess healed, only because of the mess from -1 dragging itself around, infection, etc.

Also, where are they separated-at the level of the diaphragm makes the most sense, since that is the division between the thoracic and abdominal cavities. Researchers would make mention in a report

As I said-great idea. Upvoted.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I wonder if he lightens his coffee with…
Half-and-Half?
…
I'm sorry.
Take this apology +1.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Heh, pretty damn entertaining.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I know what I'm going to write about now~

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I was in stitches.

+1.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Oh dear God.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This just became my favorite SCP.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I am not one of those people, but I can confirm that you'd be surprised.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: That is. Just adorable.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Remember when I said I would upvote you last?
I lied.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
WHAT

MY HEAD ASPLODE

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This is goddamn brilliant. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
What the fuck?

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
What.

Here, have a +1, and choke on it, you creative bastard.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I'd imagine so, if he could find anyone willing to have sex with a bloody lower torso.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I giggled lots at this.

…does SCP-1319-2 enjoy sex? I don't suggest you add that info in, but I want to know OOC because I'm curious.
